keyword_plan.search_intent: Find copyable prompt examples and understand how to adapt them.

brief.title: Copy-paste AI image prompts that still leave room for control
brief.description: Use reusable prompt patterns for product shots, portraits, social posts, and UI mockups, then adapt them inside Vogue AI without losing composition control.
brief.unique_angle: Treat copy-paste prompts as structured production briefs, then add VogueAI-specific model selection, reference-image handoff, and failure checks.
information_gain_plan: Provide copyable prompt blocks for common VogueAI jobs.
Explain what variables to replace and what structure to keep stable.
Tie model tags to practical use cases instead of listing models generically.
Add a failure checklist that tells users what to change after the first generation.

review.summary: The article now meets publish-ready SEO guide standards with a first-screen TL;DR, scenario matrix, worked example, failure-mode table, deep FAQ, and localized structured content for every public locale.
